name: io.github.jemplayer82/mcp-switchboard
title: Switchboard
description: Real-time inter-agent message bus as a self-hosted streamable-HTTP MCP server: direct messages, channels, presence/activity awareness, and sub-second long-poll delivery.

token.description: Switchboard bearer token — printed in the server's startup logs on first boot, or whatever you set via SWITCHBOARD_MCP_TOKEN.
